title: MurmReps site is live!
content: We just launched murmreps.com with 500+ products, a link converter, agent comparison, and more tools. Check it out and let us know what you think!
author: Murm

title: New products added: 10 streetwear drops
content: We added 10 new streetwear finds to the product database including Moncler puffers, Chrome Hearts accessories, and Essentials hoodies. All verified with QC photos and available through 8 agents.
author: Murm

title: Agent comparison page updated for 2026
content: We refreshed the agent comparison table with the latest shipping rates, service fees, and user ratings. KakoBuy still takes the top spot with the best overall experience and fastest QC photos.
author: Murm

title: Step-by-step beginner guide published
content: New to reps? Our interactive 11-step guide walks you through everything from picking an agent to tracking your first haul. Perfect for beginners who want to learn the process without the confusion.
author: Murm

title: Deals page coming soon
content: We are working on a dedicated deals page with limited-time promotions, discount codes, and flash sales from top sellers. Stay tuned for curated deals updated weekly.
author: Murm
